general.team_not_configured: No team configured on this server. Use `/team create` to get started.
general.not_in_roster: You are not a member of any team on this server. Ask a manager to add you with `/roster add`.
general.team_not_found:
No team named **{name}** found on this server.
Use `/team list` to see available teams.
general.permission_denied:
This action requires the **{required}** role (or higher) in **{team}**.
Your current role: `{current}`
general.select_team_description: You are a member of multiple teams. Which team do you want to perform this action for?
general.select_team_footer: 💡 Use /team switch to set a default team
general.invalid_date: Invalid date format. Use DD/MM/YYYY, e.g. `15/03/2025`
general.invalid_datetime: Invalid format. Date: DD/MM/YYYY, Time: HH:MM

team.created_next_steps:
**Next steps:**
1. `/roster add` — Add your players
2. `/team invite` — Invite your staff
3. `/cal add` — Schedule your first praccs
team.name_taken: A team named **{name}** already exists on this server.
team.no_teams_description:
No teams configured on this server.
Use `/team create` to get started.
team.switch_success: All your upcoming commands will use **{name}** by default.
team.switch_not_member: You are not a member of **{name}**.
team.owner_role_forbidden: The **Owner** role cannot be assigned manually.
team.only_owner_can_assign_manager: Only an **Owner** can assign the Manager role.
team.kick_owner_forbidden: Cannot remove the Owner from the team.
team.kick_superior_forbidden: You cannot remove a member of equal or higher rank.
team.delete_confirm_description:
Are you sure you want to delete **{name}**?

This action is **irreversible** and will delete:
- The entire roster
- The entire calendar
- All stats

roster.already_in_roster: {member} is already in the roster of **{team}**.

availability.already_exists: You already have this slot registered for {date}.
availability.not_found: No availability found for this slot.
availability.not_in_roster: You are not in the roster. Ask a staff member to add you.
availability.no_availability_week: Nobody has set their availability for the week of **{week}**.
availability.no_availability_mine: You have no upcoming availability set. Use `/dispo add`.
availability.footer_add: Use /dispo add to add your availability

calendar.cancel_success: **{title}** has been removed from the calendar.
calendar.no_events: No events this month. Use `/cal add` to create one.

pracc.add_footer: Use /pracc perf to add individual performances
pracc.no_praccs: No praccs recorded. Use `/pracc add` or `/pracc sync`.
pracc.sync_not_configured:
To enable sync, fill in your `.env`:
```
PRACC_EMAIL=your@email.com
PRACC_PASSWORD=yourpassword
PRACC_SYNC_ENABLED=true
```
pracc.sync_success:
**{added}** new pracc(s) imported from pracc.com.
Total retrieved: {total} match(es).

stats.not_configured:
Add `HENRIK_API_KEY=your_key` to your `.env`.
Get a free key at https://docs.henrikdev.xyz

roster.add: Add a player to the roster
roster.remove: Remove a player from the roster

dispo.week: View team availability for the week

cal.add: Add an event to the calendar
cal.vod: Link a VOD to an event

stats.player: Live player stats via Valorant API

team.create: Create a new team on this server
team.list: View all teams on this server
team.invite: Invite a member to the team
team.kick: Remove a member from the team

mapstats.title: 🗺️ Map Stats — {team}
mapstats.no_data: No praccs with recorded results. Use `/pracc add` with a result.

mood.already_set:
You already set your mood this week.
It has been updated.
mood.not_in_roster: You are not in this team's roster.
mood.no_moods: No players have set their mood this week yet.
